scripts.build: sh -c 'app_root="../../apps/wegotworkspace"; runtime_root="$app_root"; if [ -n "${SABRE_BUILD_DIR:-}" ]; then case "$SABRE_BUILD_DIR" in /*) runtime_root="${SABRE_BUILD_DIR%/}" ;; *) runtime_root="$app_root/${SABRE_BUILD_DIR%/}" ;; esac; fi; vendor_dir="$runtime_root/vendor"; COMPOSER_VENDOR_DIR="$vendor_dir" composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --working-dir="$app_root"'
